description.content: Search for teams, players, events, and venues.
Search for sports teams by name or short name (abbreviation). Returns team metadata including badge, logo, stadium, and social links.

query.description: Team name to search (e.g., Arsenal, Manchester United, Lakers). Free tier limited to "Arsenal" only.
Short name or abbreviation (e.g., ARS, NYK, LAL).

description.content: Search for sports players by name or associated team.

query.description: Team name to search players within.

description.content: Search for sports events by team names or season. Free tier returns a limited number of results.
Search for sports venues and stadiums by name.

query.description: (Required) Venue name to search (e.g., Wembley, Anfield).

An open, crowd-sourced sports database of artwork and metadata with a free sports API in JSON format. TheSportsDB provides data on sports leagues, teams, players, events, venues, and season standings across a wide range of sports worldwide. The v1 API is freely available; the v2 API requires a premium subscription.
